caption: A man is seated in a room that appears to be a studio or clothing shop, wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a dark green t-shirt featuring the white text "ION NEVE DO SH17". He is positioned in front of a professional black microphone. Behind him, several framed photographs hang on a grey wall, and a white mannequin wearing a white t-shirt stands nearby, alongside racks of clothing. Small logos are visible in the lower corners of the frame, including one that says "BOOST FLY". Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and laughing; he begins with a wide smile and open mouth, then transitions to a more closed-mouth expression of amusement, and finally smiles again while speaking. The background and his position remain static, with the only movement being his facial expressions and slight head tilts as he interacts with someone off-screen.
